testcase.classname: GET /api/todos should return empty array when no todos
testcase.name: GET /api/todos should return empty array when no todos

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos should return todos after creation
testcase.name: GET /api/todos should return todos after creation

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should create a new todo
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should create a new todo

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is empty string
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is empty string

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos/:id should return a single todo
testcase.name: GET /api/todos/:id should return a single todo

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo
testcase.name: GET /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo

testcase.classname: PUT /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo
testcase.name: PUT /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo
testcase.name: DELETE /api/todos/:id should return 404 for non-existent todo

testcase.classname: Unknown routes should return 404 for unknown routes
testcase.name: Unknown routes should return 404 for unknown routes
